expected: Home / Chat is visible, chat input is usable, and the right workspace panel is closed by default.

action: Click Memory, Game, Voice, Overlay, Settings, Developer / Debug, and Future / Avatar launcher entries
expected: Each entry opens a focused workspace panel with title, tabs, and a close button.

action: Click the workspace close button, then repeat with Escape
expected: The workspace closes and the app returns to Home / Chat without clearing chat input.

action: Inspect Developer / Debug, Settings, Voice, Overlay, Game, Memory, and Future / Avatar workspace headers and tabs
expected: Workspace title, close button, and tabs are fully visible above the content body and are not covered by cards or scroll content.

action: Click Event Stream, Prompt Preview, Runtime, and Trace tabs
expected: Each tab becomes selected and the workspace body changes to the matching safe debug surface: Event Stream, Prompt Preview, Runtime, or Trace.

action: Click 应用, 模型, 隐私 / 数据, and 高级 tabs
expected: Each tab remains clickable and visibly selectable, and the workspace body changes to matching content: app settings, model status, privacy/local data, or advanced legacy controls.

precondition: A workspace with long content is open, such as Settings or Developer / Debug Runtime
expected: Only the workspace body scrolls; the workspace header, tab row, and close button remain visible and clickable.

precondition: ReiLink is shown in a narrow or short window
action: Open Settings, Developer / Debug, Voice, Overlay, Game, and Memory workspaces and click their tabs
expected: The workspace remains usable without horizontal overflow; tabs and close button remain visible, selectable, and above content cards.

action: Switch Conversation, Input / Local ASR, Output, and Voice Profile tabs
expected: Each Voice tab renders different matching content; Conversation states direct Voice v2 is not implemented, Input exposes Local ASR, Output exposes Voice Output and Test Voice, and Voice Profile remains a future placeholder.

action: Switch Safe Mode, Placement, Content, and Future Game Mode tabs
expected: Each Overlay tab renders different matching content; Safe Mode states macOS auto-show is fail-closed, Placement exposes position/opacity, Content exposes message count, and Future Game Mode remains a placeholder.

action: Switch Event Stream, Prompt Preview, Runtime, and Trace tabs
expected: Debug surfaces are opt-in and Prompt Preview remains a safe summary.

action: Switch Avatar and Presentation Policy tabs
expected: Avatar and Presentation Policy render distinct placeholders for future presentation work.

precondition: Home / Chat is visible and the chat input contains an unsent draft
action: Open Settings, Developer / Debug, Voice, Overlay, and Future / Avatar; switch multiple tabs in each workspace; then close the workspace with the close button and Escape
expected: The selected tab style and content match, each workspace keeps its own active tab state, and the unsent chat draft remains unchanged.
